pageContext.name: Kate Bishop
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Battle Diorama Series Art Scale 1:10 line - Kate Bishop!  From Marvel Studios: Hawkeye, this Kate Bishop Art Scale Statue is limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted.  Hawkeye fans, don't miss your chance to add the Kate Bishop statue to your Marvel collectibles display!
